store_headline: Photography Theme with Client Proofing and Print Sales
store_subheadline: Showcase your work, deliver proofed galleries to clients, and sell prints — all in one site.
features: Advanced photo gallery and album management system
Wolf Photos plugin for professional photo library organization
Portfolio custom post type with multiple layout options
PixProof client photo proofing workflow integration
WooCommerce integration for selling prints and photography services
Built with WPBakery Page Builder for layout customization
Wolf WPBakery Extension with photography-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete photography portfolio setup
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The only WordPress theme with native PixProof client proofing
Combines portfolio showcase, client proofing, and print sales in one site — the complete photographer-to-client pipeline
PixProof lets clients review and select images on the site — no Dropbox links, no email chains
WooCommerce print sales built in so photographers sell directly to clients and collectors without a separate storefront
Light, photography-first design stands back so images lead — the theme is invisible
Wolf Photos and Wolf Albums organize the library by session, series, or client — built for photographers
WPBakery portfolio layouts designed specifically for photography, not adapted from generic themes
key_benefits: Deliver proofed galleries to clients on your site — no file-sharing tools
Sell fine art prints directly to collectors — no gallery commission
Showcase work and close clients where they proof their session
Build a site that handles client delivery, print orders, and portfolio simultaneously
Attract portrait and wedding clients with a light, image-first design
Convert portfolio visitors into clients with a workflow from showcase to delivery
design_features: Grid, masonry, and fullscreen display options
Multiple header styles with fullscreen image support
Lightbox and zoom functionality for detailed viewing
Minimalist aesthetic that keeps focus on the photography
